summary: Double-Entry Accounting System - ALL TESTS PASS (18/18 backend, 8/8 frontend features). Tested Tally-style double-entry where all party ledgers balance (Jama=credit, Nikasi=debit). Mill entry creation auto-generates 4 transactions: JAMA ledger for truck purchase, NIKASI cash for cash_paid, NIKASI ledger for diesel deduction (from truck), JAMA ledger for diesel pump fill. All payment APIs (truck, agent, diesel) create appropriate cash book entries.

1_login_admin_credentials.test_evidence: Backend test_01_login_admin passed, Playwright login confirmed

2_entry_creation_double_entry.details: Mill entry with cash_paid=5000, diesel_paid=1000 auto-creates 4 cash_transactions

3_jama_ledger_truck_purchase.details: JAMA ledger entry for truck purchase created with correct amount and party_type=Truck
3_jama_ledger_truck_purchase.test_evidence: Verified in test_05: account=ledger, txn_type=jama, party_type=Truck

4_nikasi_cash_for_cash_paid.details: NIKASI cash entry for cash_paid=5000 created correctly

5_nikasi_ledger_diesel_deduction.details: NIKASI ledger entry for diesel deduction (counted against truck) created

6_jama_ledger_diesel_pump.details: JAMA ledger entry for diesel pump fill created

7_truck_rate_update_jama.details: PUT /api/truck-payments/{entry_id}/rate updates JAMA ledger entry amount
7_truck_rate_update_jama.test_evidence: test_06_set_truck_rate passed, JAMA ledger description updated with new rate

8_truck_payment_nikasi_cash.test_evidence: test_07_make_truck_payment passed, verified linked_payment_id and party_type=Truck

9_agent_payment_jama_and_nikasi.details: POST /api/agent-payments/{mandi_name}/pay creates JAMA ledger (commission) and NIKASI cash
9_agent_payment_jama_and_nikasi.test_evidence: test_08_make_agent_payment passed, both entries verified with party_type=Agent

10_diesel_payment_nikasi_cash.details: POST /api/diesel-accounts/pay creates NIKASI cash entry for diesel pump

11_cashbook_sort_order.details: GET /api/cash-book returns transactions sorted by date DESC then created_at DESC

12_cashbook_party_type_filter.details: GET /api/cash-book with party_type filter returns only matching entries
12_cashbook_party_type_filter.test_evidence: test_11_cash_book_party_type_filter passed for Truck and Diesel filters

13_party_summary_api.details: GET /api/cash-book/party-summary returns parties with total_jama, total_nikasi, balance

14_light_theme_styling.details: Light theme with white/light backgrounds and readable dark text
14_light_theme_styling.test_evidence: Playwright verified data-theme='light' set, screenshot shows correct styling

15_cashbook_table_layout.details: Transactions table has fixed column widths and proper alignment
15_cashbook_table_layout.test_evidence: Screenshots show proper table layout with fixed columns

16_party_summary_tab.details: Party Summary tab shows summary cards (Total/Settled/Pending/Outstanding)
16_party_summary_tab.test_evidence: Playwright verified data-testid elements: party-summary-total, party-summary-settled

17_new_transaction_from_party_summary.details: New Transaction button works from Party Summary tab (bug fix verified)
17_new_transaction_from_party_summary.test_evidence: Playwright confirmed dialog opens when clicking cashbook-add-btn from party summary view

18_dark_mode_no_regression.details: Switching back to dark mode works correctly with no UI issues
18_dark_mode_no_regression.test_evidence: Playwright verified data-theme='dark' set after toggle

backend_api_tests.POST /api/entries: 200 - Creates entry with auto double-entry transactions
backend_api_tests.GET /api/cash-book: 200 - Returns transactions with correct sort order

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_38_ prefixed entries, diesel pump, and mandi target for testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 38 - Double-Entry Accounting fully tested. Key features: 1) Mill entry auto-creates 4 cash_transactions (JAMA truck, NIKASI cash, NIKASI diesel deduction, JAMA diesel pump), 2) All payment endpoints create appropriate ledger entries, 3) Cash Book sorted by date DESC then created_at DESC, 4) Party type filter works, 5) Party Summary API returns balances, 6) Light/Dark theme toggle working, 7) New Transaction dialog works from Party Summary tab. 18 backend + 8 frontend tests all pass. Database may be empty on new runs - tests create their own data.
